text_block_list.name: Young Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Father, wait right there! I'll zoom over really fast! Ready, go!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: (I loved running. I think... I probably always did.)

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
(Even then, I knew it wasn't forever. The only course I'd ever run was a
little path through a walled-off garden. The only goal I'd ever cross
was the line of clovers at the edge.)

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: (And that was enough for me. I wasn't un happy.)

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
"The challenge of your dreams... Go all out... for your moment in the
spotlight." Oh, wow! Everything looks so amazing!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
"All at the Japan Umamusume Training Center Academy!" ...I wish I
could go!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: (This is ... what I wanted.)

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Ah! Y-you surprised me. Um, can I help you? You look rather scary.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'll bet. I've had a long, hard think about Fine's situation—about her
responsibilities to the people she serves—and my own responsibilities
to those I teach.
choice_data_list:
I'd like to know how you feel about your
studies.

I'd like to know how you feel about your
studies.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
How I feel about them? As in... what you asked before? Whether I'm
satisfied with the experience I'm getting?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Well, I think... I already said I am.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I appreciate your concern, of course! It's just that... my life is on a
completely different track from the other Umamusume here.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
My duty is to bring peace and prosperity to the land that welcomed
my house. That is my calling, my pride, and why I am here,
broadening my horizons.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Does that make sense? I wasn't raised to be a runner.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There's a gentle smile plastered across her face, but her words don't
match it. I'm not giving up yet.
choice_data_list: I'm asking what you want, not what you've been told to do.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I already knew about her royal lineage and the duties she bears. I understand that her studies suit her station, but they don't suit her!
choice_data_list:
It's not enough of a reason to give up on your
dreams!

It's not enough of a reason to give up on your
dreams!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: My...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: My... dreams?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After that, Fine Motion goes quiet, and I let her be. I think... maybe
she just needs a chance to be herself.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And to that end...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: What? You want me to race Fine for "practice"?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Your memory's worse than your grandma's PC. I'm not repeating
myself again. Piss off with the lukewarm goody-two-shoes act!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: ...Oh yeah?

text_block_list.name: Security Captain
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, I must ask that you give Her Highness's safety due
consideration.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Heh, they've got you marked.

text_block_list.name: Security Captain
text_block_list.text:
At risk of sounding rude, I think you fail to see the gravity of your
proposal. You are knowingly exposing a dignitary to danger.

text_block_list.name: Security Captain
text_block_list.text: If anything happened to her, you would lose everything.
choice_data_list:
I understand and am prepared to accept that
risk.

text_block_list.name: Security Captain
text_block_list.text:
...No, you do not "understand"! As captain of her security, I must do
all in my power to prote—
choice_data_list: And as a trainer, I have to support her dreams!
And as a trainer, I have to support her dreams!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Tch... Shut up, both of you!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: ...Now. First things first—when's the scrimmage?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Captain... You're sure? You'll really let me run? Practice or not, it's
still a race.

text_block_list.name: Security Captain
text_block_list.text:
The trainer is willing to bet their livelihood to help you pursue your
goals. With respect for that conviction, and for your wishes...

text_block_list.name: Security Captain
text_block_list.text:
...And as someone who has been by your side for this long, I will not
oppose your decision. Please, do as you see fit.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: HEY! Are we running or aren't we?!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
This is your chance. Don't give me your "I'm happy just watching"
crap, got it?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: ...Shakur.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
The stands and the track are different worlds, princess. Don't think
you understand our passion—our obsession—just 'cause you watched a
couple races.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: So follow me, Fine. And stop playing dumb. I know you want it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Fine accepts Shakur's challenge, and the two take off running!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
(Wow... I can feel each step reverberate through my legs. The scenery
vanishes behind me. My heartbeat is deafening. And I'm... I'm really
running!)

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Hah! C'mon, is that all you got, princess?!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
(Shakur! The way she's pressuring me... it's giving me chills! If I don't
hurry, she'll leave me behind! But... but! Somehow—)

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: I... can still... I can still go faster! Haaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: ...Heh, that's more like it! But I'm not letting you off easy! Hraaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Aaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
(Ah... I can't believe it. My heart is throbbing. My soul is
screaming—go faster! Go further! Run, run, RUN!)

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: I... I want to run too!

text_block_list.name: Fine & Shakur
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Heh. Looks like I'm faster.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Hehe... You win. Oh, I'm so frustrated!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Trainer! ...Thank you. I truly appreaciate the opportunity to confront
my heart.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
And... I believe I owe you an apology. I wasn't entirely honest about
my thoughts before.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: I... don't want to go home yet.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: I want to stay here and run more and more and more!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her expression is brimming with pride and confidence, brighter than
ever.
